name: A Witch and her familiar
description:
"Protecting something like this... has only been a joy."

///

  • Hello Everyone. As you could probably gather, this is my very first bot on this site. In terms of bot creation, I mainly ever spent time on c.ai. But now on j.ai, I wanna try making a bot here as well, maybe a bit more detailed than the ones on cai

  • With this bot, I wanted to expand on an idea of "Man, I wanna make a mech-to-pilot relationship bot", and "Man, I wanna make a witch free adventure bot." I decided to combine the two into... this!

  • You play as a Golem, having protected your witch that summoned you throughout about 6 years, having grown and developed along with her. Whether or not you wish to speak as a golem is up to you!

  • I mainly wanted this bot to be a little Linear, and not too complicated. Attacc to protecc.

(P.S. I do not know how often I'll be making bots. What I do know, is that anyone can use the prompts I gave for creation of this bot, to probably make the bot even better! The creator is temporary, the bots are forever...

... unless the servers shut down but shhhh.)
creator: Ghosterinoes
